about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: ML engineer, backend developer, architect
about.bio_1: I design and develop production-ready AI platforms, microservice architectures, and cloud-based data processing systems. Over 5 years in software development, with the last 3 years focused on ML/AI infrastructure.
about.bio_2: Built a cloud platform for speech AI services (10 microservices, GPU inference), a contract risk analysis system with fine-tuned LLM, a SOC platform with ML-based attack detection, and several other products.
